channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Toilet really broken for ages, 16th May
item.description:
Really sadly this single public toilet has been trashed. We really need more working public toilets around Highbury Fields please. Otherwise people use the bushes around the kids play park (which is horrible for play park users and also dogs off leads then eat human faeces resulting in sickness). Have mercy.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items - commercial way, 16th May
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 254, Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London

item.description:
Please remove

item.title: Lots of litter, 16th May
item.description:
Huge amount of litter in the small triangle of grass at the junction of A10 Rectory Rd and Northwold Rd..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped several weeks ago, 16th May
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trelawn Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near pikethorne flats, 16th May
item.description:
These cars are parked right outside pikethorne flats. And I have my grandchildren down with a pram and I cannot get passed these cars. Let alone if we had a fire it would be terrible as we can’t get out of the flats with these cars parked right outside our entrance!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bampton Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car appears abandoned, 16th May
item.description:
This car has been here for at least 6 weeks and both front tires are flat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grangehill Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree overhanging onto properties, 16th May
item.description:
Please prune

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Aylesbury Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw6 5ba outside 22 Cambridge avenue bins, 16th May
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, We’ve asked some of the neighbours and they saw some people dump their trash without sorting it in the recycling for a couple weeks. They use plastic bags and throw it into the recycling. This issue is really pressing as the council has refused to take any of the bins and we have more rubbish that has been piling up as the weeks go by. Please help us get rid of this and if possible find out who is fly tipping this area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Nairne Grove, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: 3 seater settee dumped on pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Settee dumped on Picardy Road near junction with Halt Robin Road just before 401 bus stop L .Eye sore & likely to encourage more rubbish .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Crescent, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foliage obstruction, 16th May
item.description:
Pole 2 foliage obstruction request follow up to trim

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekly flytipping, 16th May
item.description:
Continual flytipping in the exact same spot. Household waste. Bags being ripped open by foxes. Cardboard box dumped, however clear evidence of who is dumping this. They have crossed their name and address out - but not enough as you can clearly see the surname of the offender. Postcode of fly tipper: DA14 5HF (flats above row of shops on St James Way) Surname of fly tipper: Gibbs From these images, you can clearly identify exactly where this person lives and fine them/prosecute like the Bexley council website states will happen? This cannot keep happening every single week, it is absolutely disgusting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ellenborough Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near lifts/rubbish chute, 16th May
item.description:
Sofa's Been here over a week - rubbish piling up, including, but not limited to, open food waste and nappies. Cockroaches in residence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bottle, 16th May
item.description:
On edge of pavement/in road gully. Grateful if you could please clear. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Grove, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and drugs, 16th May
item.description:
Loads of litter and drugs left on floor! they road clearer never comes and cleans! please add rto their list!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homer Road, Hackney, London

item.title: On council property, 16th May
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Parking bay always blocked by same cars, 16th May
item.description:
Occasionally one needs to park on the parking bay which has no yellow line restrictions. This is not possible when cars are left there for many weeks (months?). It would help if there was a restriction on the number of days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodclyffe Drive, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A board on footpath, 16th May
item.description:
Matisse salon a board on footpath, often customers park outside shops forcing pedestrians into road or wheelchair user to seek alternative route.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 286, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in bags, 16th May
item.description:
Please investigate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
